summary: Planned non-mutating inventory triage for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an independent live PR inventory shard. Three PRs remain independent but blocked on proof or branch update evidence; two ready-for-maintainer PRs need maintainer judgment before any merge-oriented action, and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter.

actions.reason: Independent focused bug-fix PR with useful code and proof signal, but not a duplicate/superseded/low-signal closeout candidate. No merge or fix action is allowed in this job.
Independent Gateway compatibility PR that is not safe to close as duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, or low-signal. Failing proof blocks merge-style handling only for this PR.
Independent UI PR with useful scoped work but missing proof and an uneditable contributor branch. Low-signal closeout and replacement fix PRs are disabled for this job.
This PR appears ready for maintainer review, but accepting the docs wording and any merge-oriented next step require maintainer judgment under the job gates.
This compatibility-surface PR needs maintainer judgment on the deprecated public API expansion and branch/check state. No close, merge, or repair PR action is allowed in this job.
